UserComments.Comment: Vehicles formerly owned by Innogy/RWE still locked out of charging-prevented from charging by SW-settings.I repeat protest against this practice of this company to punishing current owners of vehicles,which was formerly owned by Innogy/RWE.

AddressInfo.Title: Innogy Public Charging Station(AC).
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Unlimited public access,but the charging station refuses to charge former Innogy vehicles(vehicles formerly owned by Innogy RWE),these r intentionally SW-blocked from charging on Innogy charging stations.If U cannot charge here,Your vehicle was most probably formerly owned by Innogy/RWE & has their transponder onboard,which is used to prevent charging on Innogy charging station(probably till the vehicle was owned by Innogy/RWE,that transponder enabled free charging from Innogy/RWE charging station & after selling out of their fleet the transponder was set to opposite purpose-to not allowing charging on their stations @ all),tested on several stations & confirmed by a former employee of Innogy.

GeneralComments: Charging station has no display,connect the cable,then approach Your RFID card to the RFID reader of the same side as the connector,U use,till the LED above the connector turns blue. Colors: dark blue=idle,ready to connect,green=connected,waiting for authentication or charging finished(not charging);Light Blue=authentication successful,charging in progress;red=error.
